---
title: "lilace_working"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-23"
---

# import libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(BiocManager)
library(plotly)
library(tibble)
library(dbscan)
library(pheatmap)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(cmdstanr)
library(lilace)
```

# import lilace inputs
```{r}
# Data Naming Convention:
# NEWRep3 = Replicate 1; Rep4 = Replicate 2

li <- bind_rows(read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/data/2025/lilace_inputs/NEWRep3.csv") %>% 
  select(-X), read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/data/2025/lilace_inputs/Rep4.csv") %>% 
  select(-X)) %>% 
  mutate(Mutation_Type = "missense",
         Replicate = paste0(Replicate,"_",Condition))
li <- bind_rows(li, read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/data/2025/lilace_inputs/sm_Rep3.csv"), read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/data/2025/lilace_inputs/sm_Rep4.csv")) %>% select(-X) %>%
  filter(substr(Variant, 1,1) != substr(Variant, 5, 5))

li_menthol <- filter(li, Condition == "Menthol")
li_cold <- filter(li, Condition == "Cold")

set.seed(123)
```

# load input data
```{r}
condition_list <- c("cold", "menthol")
li_list <- c("li")
li_obj <- list()
for (i in li_list) {
  for (z in tolower(condition_list)) {
    testsource <- get(paste0(i, "_", z))
    obj_list <- get(paste0(i, "_obj"))
    test <- lilace_from_counts(variant_id = testsource$Variant, mutation_type = testsource$Mutation_Type, position = testsource$Position, replicate = testsource$Replicate, counts = testsource[,6:8], metadata = testsource %>%
                                     select(WT_AA, mutation = Mutation_AA, Condition))
    obj_list[[z]] <- test
    assign(paste0(i, "_obj"), obj_list)
  }
}
```

# normalize for sorting proportions
```{r}
bp <- list(NEWRep3_Menthol = c(0.3571429, 0.3970588, 0.2457983),
           NEWRep3_Cold = c(0.01198939, 0.6477886, 0.340222),
           Rep4_Menthol = c(0.18537074, 0.5621242, 0.25250501),
           Rep4_Cold = c(0.08559977, 0.5751503, 0.33924991))

for (i in names(li_obj)) {
  reps_in_data <- unique(li_obj[[i]]$data$rep)
  bp_subset <- bp[names(bp) %in% reps_in_data]
  for (z in reps_in_data) {
   li_obj[[i]] <- lilace_sorting_normalize(li_obj[[i]], bp_subset, rep_specific = T) 
  }
}
```

# run lilace
```{r}
condition_list <- c("menthol", "cold")
obj_list <- c("li_obj")

# Initialize lists to store results
lilace_results <- list()
lilace_scores <- list()

for (obj_name in obj_list) {
  # Initialize sublists for this object type
  lilace_results[[obj_name]] <- list()
  lilace_scores[[obj_name]] <- list()
  
  # Get the actual object
  obj <- get(obj_name)
  
  for (i in condition_list) {
    output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/", 
                         obj_name, "/lo_", i)
    
    # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
    if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
      dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    
    temp <- obj[[i]]
    
    cat("Processing", obj_name, "-", i, "\n")
    
    # Store results in nested lists
    lilace_results[[obj_name]][[i]] <- lilace_fit_model(
      temp, output_dir, 
      control_correction = TRUE, 
      use_positions = FALSE, 
      pseudocount = TRUE, 
      n_parallel_chains = 4
    )
    
    lilace_scores[[obj_name]][[i]] <- read_tsv(
      paste0(output_dir, "/lilace_output/variant_scores.tsv"), 
      show_col_types = FALSE
    )
  }
}

# Save combined scores
for (obj_name in obj_list) {
  for (i in condition_list) {
    output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/",
                         obj_name, "/combined_score/", i)
    if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
      dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    score_path <- file.path(output_dir, "combined_scores.csv")
    write.csv(x = lilace_scores[[obj_name]][[i]], file = score_path, row.names = FALSE)
  }
}
```

# plot results
```{r}
condition_list <- c("Menthol","Cold")
rep_list <- c("NEWRep3", "Rep4")

# Combined replicate heatmaps (all reps together)
for (i in condition_list) {
  output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/lo_", tolower(i))
  temp <- lilace_scores[["li_obj"]][[tolower(i)]]
  
  # Check if scores exist
  if (is.null(temp) || nrow(temp) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No scores found for condition", i))
    next
  }
  
  coldtest <- temp %>% 
    filter(!str_detect(variant, "SM")) %>% 
    select(mutation, position, effect_se) %>% 
    mutate(mutation = factor(mutation, levels = c("I", "L", "F", "V", "C", "M", "A", "W", "T", "Y",
              "G", "S", "N", "H", "P", "Q", "R", "E", "K", "D"))) %>% 
    mutate(position = factor(position, levels = as.character(927:974))) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = position, values_from = effect_se) %>% 
    arrange(mutation) %>% 
    mutate(across(-mutation, as.numeric)) %>% 
    column_to_rownames(var="mutation") %>% 
    as.matrix()

  # Color palette: blue for positive, red for negative, white at zero
  all_vals <- as.numeric(coldtest)
  minv <- min(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  maxv <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Always ensure white at 0, red at min, blue at max
  breaks <- seq(minv, maxv, length.out = 102)
  zero_index <- which.min(abs(breaks))
  cols_low <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "white"))(zero_index)
  cols_high <- colorRampPalette(c("white", "blue"))(102 - zero_index)
  my_colors <- c(cols_low, cols_high[-1])

  p <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
    coldtest,
    na_col = "black",
    color = my_colors,
    breaks = breaks,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    cellwidth = 9,
    cellheight = 9,
    main = paste0("Heatmap for All Amino Acids at Every Position (",i,")")
  )
  print(p)
  
  plot_dir <- "/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalplots"
  if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, paste0("combrep_", i, "_hm.pdf")), plot=p, width = 10, height = 8)
  
  coldtest <- as.data.frame(coldtest) %>% 
    rownames_to_column(var="Substituting Residue")
  write.csv(as.data.frame(coldtest), file = paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/combinedFINAL/",i,"_combinedscore-standarderror.csv"))
}
```


# process rep as individual
```{r}
# Prepare lists to store objects and scores
lilace_indrep_results <- list()
lilace_indrep_scores <- list()

rep_list <- c("NEWRep3", "Rep4")
condition_list <- c("menthol", "cold")
li_obj_rep <- list()

for (i in rep_list) {
  li_obj_rep[[i]] <- list()
  for (z in condition_list) {
    li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]] <- list()
    li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]] <- li_obj[[z]]
    li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]][["normalized_data"]] <- li_obj[[z]][["normalized_data"]] %>% 
      filter(str_detect(rep, i))
    li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]][["data"]] <- li_obj[[z]][["data"]] %>% 
      filter(str_detect(rep, i))
  }

  
  # Fit models and save results / scores
  lilace_indrep_results[[i]] <- list()
  lilace_indrep_scores[[i]] <- list()
}

for (i in rep_list) {
  for (z in condition_list) {
    bp_rep <- bp[grep(i, names(bp))]
    bp_subset <- bp_rep[grep(z, names(bp_rep), ignore.case = TRUE)]
    li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]] <- lilace_sorting_normalize(li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]], bp_subset, rep_specific = T)
    output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep/lo_", i, "_", z)
    if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    
    # Fit model
    lilace_indrep_results[[i]][[z]] <- lilace_fit_model(
      li_obj_rep[[i]][[z]], 
      output_dir,
      control_correction = TRUE,
      use_positions = FALSE,
      pseudocount = TRUE,
      n_parallel_chains = 4
    )
    
    # Read variant_scores.tsv
    score_path <- file.path(output_dir, "lilace_output", "variant_scores.tsv")
    if (file.exists(score_path)) {
      lilace_indrep_scores[[i]][[z]] <- read_tsv(score_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
    } else {
      warning(paste("variant_scores.tsv not found for replicate", i, "condition", z))
    }
  }
  
  # Generate heatmaps for each condition
  for (z in condition_list) {
    temp <- lilace_indrep_scores[[i]][[z]]
    if (is.null(temp)) next
    
    coldtest <- temp %>% 
      filter(!str_detect(variant, "SM")) %>% 
      select(mutation, position, effect) %>% 
      mutate(mutation = factor(mutation, levels = c("I","L","F","V","C","M","A","W","T","Y",
                                                    "G","S","N","H","P","Q","R","E","K","D"))) %>% 
      mutate(position = factor(position, levels = as.character(927:974))) %>% 
      pivot_wider(names_from = position, values_from = effect) %>% 
      arrange(mutation) %>% 
      mutate(across(-mutation, as.numeric)) %>% 
      column_to_rownames(var = "mutation") %>% 
      as.matrix()
    a <- lilace_score_density(temp, output_dir, score.col="effect", 
                     name=paste0("l_",i,"score_histogram"), hist=T, scale.free=T)
    
    # Color palette
    all_vals <- as.numeric(coldtest)
    minv <- min(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    maxv <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    breaks <- seq(minv, maxv, length.out = 102)
    zero_index <- which.min(abs(breaks))
    cols_low <- colorRampPalette(c("red","white"))(zero_index)
    cols_high <- colorRampPalette(c("white","blue"))(102-zero_index)
    my_colors <- c(cols_low, cols_high[-1])
    
    p <- pheatmap(
      coldtest,
      na_col = "black",
      color = my_colors,
      breaks = breaks,
      cluster_rows = FALSE,
      cluster_cols = FALSE,
      cellwidth = 9,
      cellheight = 9,
      main = paste0("Heatmap for All Amino Acids at Every Position using Lilace (", i, " - ", z, ")")
    )
    print(p)
  }
}

condition_list <- c("menthol", "cold")
for (i in rep_list) {
  output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep/", i)
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  for (z in condition_list) {
  score_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(z, "_scores.csv"))
  write.csv(x = lilace_indrep_scores[[i]][[z]], file = score_path, row.names = FALSE)
}
}
```

# visualize indrep
```{r}
condition_list <- c("menthol", "cold")
rep_list <- c("NEWRep3", "Rep4")

# Generate heatmaps for all replicates
for (i in rep_list) {
  for (z in condition_list) {
    output_dir <- paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep/lo_", i, "_", tolower(z))
    score_path <- file.path(output_dir, "lilace_output", "variant_scores.tsv")
    
    if (file.exists(score_path)) {
      lilace_indrep_scores[[i]][[z]] <- read_tsv(score_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
    } else {
      warning(paste("variant_scores.tsv not found for replicate", i, "condition", z))
    }
    
    temp <- lilace_indrep_scores[[i]][[z]]
    if (is.null(temp) || nrow(temp) == 0) next
    
    coldtest <- temp %>% 
      filter(!str_detect(variant, "SM")) %>% 
      select(mutation, position, effect_se) %>% 
      mutate(mutation = factor(mutation, levels = c("I","L","F","V","C","M","A","W","T","Y",
                                                    "G","S","N","H","P","Q","R","E","K","D"))) %>% 
      mutate(position = factor(position, levels = as.character(927:974))) %>% 
      pivot_wider(names_from = position, values_from = effect_se) %>% 
      arrange(mutation) %>% 
      mutate(across(-mutation, as.numeric)) %>% 
      column_to_rownames(var = "mutation") %>% 
      as.matrix()
    
    # Color palette
    all_vals <- as.numeric(coldtest)
    minv <- min(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    maxv <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    breaks <- seq(minv, maxv, length.out = 102)
    zero_index <- which.min(abs(breaks))
    cols_low <- colorRampPalette(c("red","white"))(zero_index)
    cols_high <- colorRampPalette(c("white","blue"))(102-zero_index)
    my_colors <- c(cols_low, cols_high[-1])
    
    p <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
      coldtest,
      na_col = "black",
      color = my_colors,
      breaks = breaks,
      cluster_rows = FALSE,
      cluster_cols = FALSE,
      cellwidth = 9,
      cellheight = 9,
      main = paste0("Heatmap for All Amino Acids at Every Position using Lilace (", i, " - ", z, ")"))
    print(p)
    
    plot_dir <- "/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalplots"
    if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, paste0(i,"_",z,"_indrep_hm.pdf")), plot=p, width = 10)
    
    coldtest <- as.data.frame(coldtest) %>% 
    rownames_to_column(var="Substituting Residue")
  write.csv(coldtest, file = paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrepFINAL/",i,"_",z,"_indrepse.csv"))
  }
}

# Pairwise replicate correlations
repscorecor_list <- list()
cor_result_list <- list()

# Define replicate pairs to compare
rep_pairs <- list(
  c("NEWRep3", "Rep4")
)

for (z in condition_list) {
  # Initialize storage for this condition
  repscorecor_list[[z]] <- list()
  cor_result_list[[z]] <- list()
  
  for (pair in rep_pairs) {
    rep1 <- pair[1]
    rep2 <- pair[2]
    pair_name <- paste0(rep1, "_vs_", rep2)
    
    path1 <- file.path("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep",
                       paste0("lo_", rep1, "_", z),
                       "lilace_output/variant_scores.tsv")
    path2 <- file.path("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep",
                       paste0("lo_", rep2, "_", z),
                       "lilace_output/variant_scores.tsv")
    
    if (!file.exists(path1) || !file.exists(path2)) {
      warning(paste("Missing file for", pair_name, "in condition", z))
      next
    }
    
    tempcor1 <- read_tsv(path1, show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
      mutate(id = paste0(WT_AA, position, mutation)) %>% 
      filter(!grepl("SM", id)) %>% 
      dplyr::select(id, effect) %>% 
      dplyr::rename(!!paste0("effect_", rep1) := effect)
    
    tempcor2 <- read_tsv(path2, show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
      mutate(id = paste0(WT_AA, position, mutation)) %>% 
      filter(!grepl("SM", id)) %>% 
      dplyr::select(id, effect) %>% 
      dplyr::rename(!!paste0("effect_", rep2) := effect)
    
    tempp <- inner_join(tempcor1, tempcor2, by = "id")
    repscorecor_list[[z]][[pair_name]] <- tempp
    
    cor_result <- cor.test(tempp[[paste0("effect_", rep1)]], 
                           tempp[[paste0("effect_", rep2)]], 
                           method = "pearson")
    cor_result_list[[z]][[pair_name]] <- cor_result
    
    print(paste("Condition:", z, "- Pair:", pair_name, "- Rows:", nrow(tempp), 
                "- Cor:", round(cor_result$estimate, 4), 
                "- P-value:", format(cor_result$p.value, scientific = TRUE)))
    
    p <- ggplot(tempp, aes(x = .data[[paste0("effect_", rep1)]], 
                           y = .data[[paste0("effect_", rep2)]])) +
      geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
      theme_minimal() +
      stat_cor(method = "pearson", p.digits = 3, r.digits = 3) +
      labs(
        x = rep1,
        y = rep2,
        title = paste0(rep1, " vs ", rep2, " (", z, ")")
      )
    print(p)
    
    plot_dir <- "/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalplots"
    if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, paste0("indrep_corr_", pair_name, "_", z, ".pdf")), 
           plot=p, width = 8, height = 6)
  }
}

# Save correlation data
for (z in names(repscorecor_list)) {
  for (pair_name in names(repscorecor_list[[z]])) {
    write_csv(
      repscorecor_list[[z]][[pair_name]],
      paste0("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep/repscorecor_", pair_name, "_", z, ".csv")
    )
  }
}

# Correlation summary
cor_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(cor_result_list), function(z) {
    bind_rows(
      lapply(names(cor_result_list[[z]]), function(pair_name) {
        x <- cor_result_list[[z]][[pair_name]]
        tibble(
          condition = z,
          comparison = pair_name,
          correlation = x$estimate,
          p_value = x$p.value,
          method = x$method
        )
      })
    )
  })
)

write_csv(cor_summary, "/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/indrep/cor_results.csv")
print(cor_summary)
```
